Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Beast King]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — The Beast King has territory on the island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 12''' — The Beast King is a figure who provides protection to Ziel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 12''' — The Beast King is a legend who was once a crippled boy that befriended ancient sacred beasts and rose to the level of a Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 12''' — The Beast King is one of the guardians protecting human civilization in the Wasteland between Akura territory and the land of the dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — The Beast King is Ziel's patron.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — The Beast King sits on a log and eats meat.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — The Beast King is sought out by Northstrider in the Wasteland.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — The Beast King and his fellow Heralds will help keep cults in check.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — The Beast King will be pleased to see Lord Ziel in fighting shape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — The Beast King is fighting against the Dreadgods.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
